headline: Keybanc Maintains Underweight on Consolidated Edison, Lowers Price Target to $94
summary: Keybanc  analyst Sophie Karp   maintains Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $97 to $94.
